subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Hádí! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast been guided by the guidance of God, the Lord of the mighty Throne, and naught hath deterred thee from His signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم الهادی طوبی لک بما اهتدیت بهدی الله رب العرش العظیم و مامنعک اشارات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
